name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami EZPAWN-family pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, and pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off retail.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida, operating under the EZPAWN family of stores banner. The shop serves the northwest Miami community in the 33169 zip code with accessible, collateral-based financial services. As part of the broader EZPAWN network, this location benefits from chain-wide infrastructure including a centralized online shop, a loyalty rewards program, and digital account management tools that set it apart from independent pawn operators.

The store's core offering is pawn loans — customers bring in items in decent working condition, receive a cash loan based on the item's appraised value, and can reclaim their property by repaying the loan plus fees within the agreed term. Gold and diamond jewelry buying is prominently featured, with on-site precious metal testing for gold of any weight or karat. Retail shoppers can browse thousands of pre-owned brand-name items — electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, musical equipment, handbags, and sneakers — priced 25% to 70% below new retail. This Miami location also carries two specialty services not universally available at EZPAWN stores: Firearms and Auto Loans.

Value Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through the EZPAWN digital platform. The EZ+ Rewards program lets customers earn points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions, with online account management for pawn extensions and layaway payments. An Instant Quote tool provides upfront valuations on electronics online before a customer visits the store. Layaway is available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments. The Jewelry VIP Program adds further value with guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up credits on future jewelry purchases, free stone replacement, and complimentary jewelry cleaning.

While Value Pawn & Jewelry offers genuine utility for cash-strapped consumers, pawn loans are high-cost, last-resort products — fees and conditions apply, but the full cost of borrowing is not published on the website, and customers must ask for a complete fee schedule before agreeing to any transaction. Items not redeemed by the end of the loan term are forfeited and may be sold. The 'Take Today' buy-now-pay-later option for retail purchases involves third-party financing and requires credit eligibility, so approval is not guaranteed. Prospective borrowers should compare total pawn loan costs against alternatives before committing.
address: 4770 W Irlo Bronson Memorial Hwy, Kissimmee, FL 34746

company_info.headquarters: 4770 W Irlo Bronson Memorial Hwy, Kissimmee, FL 34746

pros: Part of EZPAWN chain with a functioning online shop — browse and purchase inventory remotely
EZ+ Rewards program earns points on pawn, redemption, sell, and purchase transactions
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value online before visiting the store
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up credits, free stone replacement, and free cleaning
Specialty services at this location include Firearms and Auto Loans — not offered at all EZPAWN stores
Sunday hours available (12–5pm), accommodating customers who cannot visit on weekdays
cons: Pawn loan fees and APR are not disclosed on the website — customers must inquire in-store for full cost of borrowing
'Take Today' financing requires third-party credit approval and is not guaranteed for all applicants
Items not redeemed within the loan period are forfeited permanently with no recovery option
Not all services are available in all areas; online payments are restricted in certain states
No information on maximum loan amounts, loan terms, or interest rate ranges is provided publicly
best_for: Miami residents who need immediate cash and can collateralize electronics, jewelry, tools, or other valuables
Bargain shoppers seeking pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, and gear at 25–70% off retail
Consumers with gold or diamond jewelry to sell who want on-site testing and same-day payment
Shoppers who need flexible payment options like layaway but do not qualify for traditional credit financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Miami residents who need fast cash against personal property or who want deeply discounted pre-owned goods with flexible payment options. The primary caveat is that pawn loan costs — including fees and forfeiture risk — are not disclosed online, making it essential to review full terms in-store before agreeing to any loan transaction.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying with on-site precious metal testing
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales at 25–70% off retail prices
Instant Quote tool for online electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards loyalty program with points on eligible transactions
Online shop with daily new inventory arrivals
Take Today flexible payment financing via third-party partners
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan value, trade-up credits, stone replacement, cleaning)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and merchandise
Firearms sales (specialty service at this location)
Auto Loans (specialty service at this location)
